title: Headlines Drive Action Amid March Resistance
html:
Headlines Drive Action Amid March Resistance

Good morning traders.

+ Market Pulse: Yesterday's momentum from last week continued for equities, even through overnight trading. Markets briefly dipped to lower lows than yesterday's session (-.9% from overnight highs), reinforcing what elevated VIX levels already indicate: positive headlines remain necessary to sustain rallies in the current environment. The see-saw pattern is expected to persist until meaningful progress emerges on the war front.

+ SPX tracker: The SPX remains well off its highs and continues to contend with March resistance levels. Significant positive headlines would likely be needed to trigger a sustainable and substantial bullish pattern from current levels.
Levels: Resistance at 6650, 6680, 6710, and 6737. Support at 6588, 6570, 6545, and 6360.
- Short term lines: ES_F | SPX

+ Trends update: SPY | QQQ | IWM | VIX | OIL | GOLD.

+ Live discussion, available HERE (PW: 885522)

Nic

+ Key Talking Point:
— War Headlines Anytime —
— WED APR 8 —
FOMC Minutes (from Mar 18 meeting) 2:00 PM ET
— THU APR 9 —
PCE, GDP
— FRI APR 10 —
CPI, Michigan Sentiment

+ Earnings TABLE
Wed Apr 8: DAL RPM | STZ
